title: Skills & Training Advisory Services
text:
Skills & Training Advisory Services - SupportGoWhere
Skills & Training Advisory Services
Share link
Receive personalised advice on your skills and training needs through one-to-one consultations with Skills Ambassadors.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Discover emerging trends across different sectors and insights on in-demand skills and jobs
Collapse all sections
About this support

A free 30 to 45 minute 1-to-1 personalised consultation with a Skills Ambassador to identify:

Your skills and training needs to achieve your career goals

Skills required to support your career transition or progression

Suitable courses and course providers that cater to your needs

The various assistance schemes to support your skills upgrading efforts

Who is this for?

All Singapore Citizens or Permanent Residents

How to apply?

For virtual consultation, you can register online.

For in-person consultation, visit any of the Centres on Monday, Wednesday and Friday (except Public Holidays) from 10am to 5.30pm.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays
8.30 am to 5.30 pm
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 07 Nov 2025
